texto: Genius does what it must, and Talent does what it can.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Edward Robert Bulwer-Lytton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Genius does what it must, and Talent does what it can.” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, genius, talent, útil em momentos de talent.

seo.titleSeo: "Genius does what it must, and Talent does what it can." — Edward Robert Bulwer-Lytton | Metamensagem
seo.descriptionSeo: Orientação direta de Edward Robert Bulwer-Lytton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Genius does what it must, and Talent does what it can.” funciona…

frase_original: Genius does what it must, and Talent does what it can.

texto: We may live without poetry, music, and art; We may live without conscience, and live without heart; We may live without friends; we may live without books; But civilized man cannot live without cooks. He may live without books,—what is knowledge but grieving? He may live without hope,—what is hope but deceiving? He may live without love,—what is passion but pining? But where is the man that can live without dining?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Edward Robert Bulwer-Lytton que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “We may live without poetry, music, and art; We may live without conscience, and live without hear…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, food, reflexao, com foco em termino e reflexao.
